normal: clear and transparent lung fields with no abnormal spots
clear rib margins and a sharp diaphragm outline
normal lung blood vessel pattern without crowding
clean black lung zones and no signs of scarring
high contrast and well-defined structures in both lungs
pneumoconiosis: tiny bright specks scattered throughout the lungs
many small white dots close together, like grains of sand
a fine net-like pattern of white lines across the lung fields
hazy, cloudy areas that blur lung details
